directory.name: OpenTools
directory.description: Discover and compare over 2,500 AI tools, MCP servers, experts, and resources. The complete AI ecosystem for builders. Features search, categories, and launch platform.
directory.type: AI tools directory covering tools, MCP servers, experts, resources, AI companies, and AI models

submission_guidelines.summary: Submit your AI tool via the web form at https://opentools.ai/friends/launch-tool. The form collects tool name, tool URL, and requires agreement to terms. The directory also accepts MCP servers listed under a separate section.
steps: Enter the Tool URL starting with https:// (required)

required_fields.description: Name of the AI tool or product
Website URL of the tool, must start with https://

submission_guidelines.review_process: Manual review by the OpenTools team. Successful launches tracked: 120+ launches reported.
submission_guidelines.notes: The submission form is client-side rendered (Next.js) with Google authentication integration (google_id present). The site advertises 'Launch to your next 1000 customers' and targets reaching 100k+ active AI enthusiasts. Advertising is also available via Google Form at https://forms.gle/cttiR9SNE8Xv8Sik8. No API endpoint for automated submission was identified — submission appears to be exclusively through the web form with manual review. For MCP servers specifically, there is a dedicated directory at /mcp but no separate MCP-server-specific submission flow was found (MCP servers likely submitted via the same /friends/launch-tool form or listed separately).
